testing.mock_patterns: Cookiecutter template fixtures using pytest fixtures with tmpdir_factory
testing.notes: Tests validate cookiecutter template generation. The test suite uses a conftest.py fixture that generates projects from the cookiecutter template in temporary directories. Tests check that generated files exist and are properly templated (no Jinja curly braces remain). Some tests fail due to missing setup.py files in the simple template branch, but the test framework itself runs successfully.

build.notes: Simple Python project with dependencies managed via requirements.txt. No build step required - this is a Cookiecutter template repository, not a buildable application.

conventions.test_naming: pytest convention: test classes named TestXxx, test methods named test_xxx
conventions.import_style: Standard Python imports, grouped by stdlib, third-party, and local
conventions.notes: Test files use pytest class-based organization with @pytest.mark.usefixtures decorator. Tests are parameterized using pytest fixtures.

test_commands.notes: 18 tests collected, 8 passed, 10 failed. Exit code 1. Failures are expected - tests validate cookiecutter template structure and some templates (simple branch) lack setup.py files that tests expect. Test framework runs successfully.

container_recipe.notes: Container runs successfully with standard python:3.11 image. No system dependencies required beyond Python stdlib and pip packages. Tests execute but some fail due to template structure differences across branches.
